compiled_units.title: Entropy intuition
compiled_units.summary: Entropy measures uncertainty in class distribution.
compiled_units.body_text: Entropy is highest when classes are evenly mixed and lower when one class dominates. This helps decision trees decide which split reduces uncertainty.

compiled_units.title: Entropy worked example
compiled_units.summary: A small dataset example showing how entropy changes after a split.
compiled_units.body_text: Compute parent entropy, then compute child entropies after splitting the data. The weighted average of child entropies determines information gain.
